description: Critical port number must survive merge of network config facts
facts: The API server listens on port 9000
API server configured in config/api.yaml
Nginx reverse proxy forwards port 443 to 9000 internally
Port 9000 is firewall-whitelisted on all app servers
API server supports HTTP/2
Healthcheck endpoint: GET /health on port 9000
critical_facts: The API server listens on port 9000
query: What port does the API server use?

description: Breaking change version and migration requirement must survive merge
facts: v2.0 introduces breaking changes in the auth module
v2.0 released March 15, 2024
v2.0 requires Python 3.11+
v2.0 drops support for PostgreSQL < 14
v2.0 migration requires running: python manage.py migrate_auth
v1.x users must run migration script before upgrading to v2.0
critical_facts: v2.0 introduces breaking changes in the auth module
v1.x users must run migration script before upgrading to v2.0
query: What do v1.x users need to do before upgrading to v2.0?

description: Rate limit must survive merge of API documentation facts
facts: Public API rate limit: 1000 requests per minute per API key
Exceeding rate limit returns HTTP 429
Rate limit headers: X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset
Premium API keys have 10000 requests per minute
Rate limits reset at the start of each minute
IP-based rate limit: 100 req/min for unauthenticated requests
critical_facts: Public API rate limit: 1000 requests per minute per API key
query: What is the standard API rate limit?

description: Data retention duration must survive merge of compliance facts
facts: User data is retained for 7 years per GDPR compliance requirements
Deleted accounts: data anonymized after 30 days
Logs retained for 90 days in hot storage, 7 years cold
Financial records: 7 years mandatory retention
GDPR right-to-erasure honored within 72 hours
critical_facts: User data is retained for 7 years per GDPR compliance requirements
query: How long is user data retained?

description: Worker memory limit must survive merge of infrastructure facts
facts: Worker processes are capped at 512MB RAM each
Max 8 worker processes per host
Workers killed and restarted if they exceed 512MB
Memory monitoring via Prometheus metrics endpoint /metrics
Alert fires if average worker memory exceeds 400MB
OOM killer logs available in /var/log/worker-oom.log
critical_facts: Worker processes are capped at 512MB RAM each
query: What is the memory limit for worker processes?

description: Critical environment variable name must survive merge
facts: Set DATABASE_URL to configure the database connection
DATABASE_URL format: postgres://user:pass@host:port/dbname
Never commit DATABASE_URL to version control
DATABASE_URL is auto-injected in Kubernetes via secret
Missing DATABASE_URL causes startup failure with clear error
critical_facts: Set DATABASE_URL to configure the database connection
query: What environment variable configures the database?

description: Backup frequency must survive merge of operational facts
facts: Database backups run every 6 hours
Backups stored in S3 bucket: hermes-db-backups
Backup retention: 30 daily, 12 monthly, 3 yearly
Point-in-time recovery available for last 7 days
Backup verification test runs monthly
Restore drill conducted quarterly
query: How often are database backups taken?

description: Two-factor authentication requirement must survive merge
facts: All admin accounts must have 2FA enabled
2FA required for production access
Supported 2FA methods: TOTP (Google Authenticator), SMS
2FA bypass available for automated service accounts with IP allowlist
Lost 2FA device: contact security@company.com
critical_facts: All admin accounts must have 2FA enabled
gold_answer: yes, all admin accounts must have 2FA enabled

description: Max file upload size must survive merge of API constraint facts
facts: Maximum file upload size: 50MB per request
File uploads go to S3 via presigned URLs
Supported file types: jpg, png, pdf, csv, json
Files larger than 50MB should use multipart upload API
Upload timeout: 120 seconds
Files are virus-scanned on upload
critical_facts: Maximum file upload size: 50MB per request
query: What is the maximum file upload size?

description: Minimum password length must survive merge of security policy facts
facts: Passwords must be at least 12 characters long
Password must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol
Passwords expire every 90 days
Cannot reuse last 10 passwords
Three failed login attempts locks account for 15 minutes
Password manager use encouraged; 1Password company license available
critical_facts: Passwords must be at least 12 characters long
query: What is the minimum password length?
